title: Hardware implementation of configurable chromatic dispersion model for real-time optical fiber communication simulation systems
authors: Jing Jiang, Chen Xie, Ming Chen
abstract: Compared to conventional experimental setups, hardware-based real-time optical fiber simulation significantly reduces verification costs by digitally modeling optoelectronic devices while enabling dynamic parameter adjustments, providing exceptional flexibility and scalability. Moreover, real-time simulation outperforms traditional software-based methods in speed, serving as a more efficient platform for comprehensive digital signal processing algorithm validation. Optical fiber, as the core component of fiber-optic communication systems, exhibits chromatic dispersion (CD) in direct detection optical transmission systems, causing frequency-selective power attenuation that severely degrades the received signal performance. Precise CD modeling is thus critical for high-fidelity optical channel emulation. In this paper, we propose a field programmable gate array (FPGA)-based online configurable hardware CD model implementation scheme enabled by block convolution approaches. A 40-GSa/s CD model with 128 parallel input/output channels is implemented in a single FPGA chip, and its parameters can be adjusted via the joint test action group interface. The performance of the CD model is investigated in a Matlab and FPGA co-simulation platform, where the intensity-modulated optical orthogonal frequency division multiplexing (OFDM) signal is offline generated for the input of the hardware CD model, and the output of the CD model is fed into a direct-detection OFDM receiver emulated by Matlab. The results show that the proposed hardware CD models with overlap-add/overlap-save methods can achieve a deviation of 1×10<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">-2</sup> in terms of normalized root-mean-square error over more than 800 km of standard single-mode fiber transmission, compared to one equivalently implemented with a full-length fast Fourier transform-based circular convolution method with a sufficient-length impulse response sequence using Matlab. Also, similar on-chip resource overheads are observed for the proposed two hardware CD models. Moreover, similar bit error rate performance is achieved in the OFDM systems supported by the hardware and software CD models.
title_zh: 用于实时光纤通信仿真系统的可配置色散模型的硬件实现
abstract_zh: 与传统的实验设置相比，基于硬件的实时光纤仿真通过数字化建模光电设备并实现动态参数调整，显著降低了验证成本，同时提供了卓越的灵活性和可扩展性。此外，实时仿真在速度上优于传统的基于软件的方法，为全面的数字信号处理算法验证提供了一个更高效的平台。作为光纤通信系统的核心组件，光纤在直接检测光传输系统中表现出色散（CD）效应，导致频率选择性功率衰减，严重降低接收信号性能。因此，精确的CD建模对于高保真光学信道仿真至关重要。本文提出了一种基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的在线可配置硬件CD模型实现方案，该方案采用分块卷积方法实现。在一个FPGA芯片中实现了速率达40 GSa/s、具有128路并行输入/输出通道的CD模型，并可通过联合测试行动组（JTAG）接口调节其参数。该CD模型的性能在Matlab与FPGA联合仿真平台上进行了研究：强度调制的光正交频分复用（OFDM）信号在离线状态下生成，作为硬件CD模型的输入，而CD模型的输出则送入由Matlab仿真的直接检测OFDM接收机。结果表明，所提出的基于重叠相加法和重叠保留法的硬件CD模型，在超过800 km的标准单模光纤传输条件下，相对于在Matlab中使用足够长度的脉冲响应序列并通过全长度快速傅里叶变换实现的循环卷积方法，其归一化均方根误差偏差仅为1×10⁻²。此外，所提出的两种硬件CD模型在片上资源开销方面表现相似。同时，在由硬件和软件CD模型支持的OFDM系统中，也实现了相近的误码率性能。

title: Hybrid Dynamic-Statistical Algorithm for Optimizing CMOS-Type System Configuration
authors: Iryna Kremer, Olha Shymchyshyn, Mariia Ivakh, Ruslan Tykhovetskyi
publish: 2026 IEEE 18th International Conference on Advanced Trends in Radioelectronics, Telecommunications and Computer Engineering (TCSET)
abstract: This paper investigates the impact of technological variability on configurable CMOS GreenPAK systems and the limitations of conventional analysis techniques. Using empirical data from the SLG47011V chip, correlation links between key functional block parameters were identified and incorporated into refined statistical models. A hybrid dynamic–statistical algorithm is introduced, combining step-wise digital state-machine simulation with analytical variability estimation via a modified Delta method. Compared with Monte Carlo analysis, the proposed approach reproduces statistical parameters with an error below 2% while reducing computational cost by over two orders of magnitude. For a PWM generator, agreement with experimental measurements better than 0.2% was achieved. The method enables fast and accurate reliability evaluation and is well suited for early-stage design of configurable mixed-signal microsystems.
title_zh: 用于优化CMOS型系统配置的混合动态-统计算法
abstract_zh: 本文研究了工艺波动对可配置CMOS GreenPAK系统的影响以及传统分析方法的局限性。基于SLG47011V芯片的实测数据，识别出关键功能模块参数之间的相关性，并将其纳入改进的统计模型中。提出了一种混合动态–统计算法，将分步式数字状态机仿真与基于改进Delta方法的解析化变异性估计相结合。与蒙特卡洛分析相比，该方法在统计参数上的误差低于2%，同时计算成本降低了两个数量级以上。针对脉宽调制（PWM）发生器的设计，其分析结果与实验测量值的吻合度优于0.2%。该方法能够实现快速而准确的可靠性评估，非常适合于可配置混合信号微系统的早期设计阶段。

title: A Model-Based Design Approach for CFD Hardware Acceleration: Comparative Analysis of FPGA, CPU, and GPU Performance in Channel Flow
authors: Emine Elif Yigit, Ramazan Yeniceri, Ibrahim Ozkol
abstract: This paper presents a model-based FPGA (a type of reconfigurable digital integrated circuit) accelerator for well-known classical channel flow problem CFD simulation and compares its performance with CPU and GPU implementations. A 100-core pipelined solver for Couette–Poiseuille flow is developed using a Model-Based Design approach in MATLAB/Simulink environment, where the high-level algorithm is developed and automatically translated into HDL code (the source code of the accelerator) via MATLAB HDL Coder. The design achieves a 6.34× speed-up over the GPU on a 350 × 350 grid with 177,824 iterations. The model-based workflow significantly reduces development time by enabling high-level algorithm design, automatic HDL generation, and early verification. Operating at 106 MHz, the FPGA solution offers high data processing capacity and low power consumption, making it an ideal choice for real-time, onboard CFD applications in energy-constrained aerospace systems. Experimental results demonstrate higher performance per watt and consistent timing compared to CPU and GPU alternatives. The results highlight the scalability and versatility of model-based FPGA acceleration for CFD and pave the way for future applications involving unstructured grids and more complex flow scenarios.
title_zh: 一种用于CFD硬件加速的基于模型的设计方法：FPGA、CPU和GPU在通道流中的性能比较分析
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于模型的现场可编程门阵列（FPGA，一种可重构数字集成电路）加速器，用于著名的经典通道流动问题的计算流体动力学（CFD）仿真，并将其性能与CPU和GPU实现进行了比较。在MATLAB/Simulink环境中采用基于模型的设计方法，开发了一个用于库埃特-泊肃叶流动的100核流水线求解器，其中高层算法通过MATLAB HDL Coder自动转换为硬件描述语言（HDL）代码（即加速器的源代码）。在350×350网格、177,824次迭代的条件下，该设计相较GPU实现了6.34倍的加速。基于模型的设计流程显著缩短了开发周期，支持高层算法设计、HDL代码自动生成以及早期验证。该FPGA方案工作频率为106 MHz，具备高数据处理能力和低功耗特性，非常适合在能源受限的航空航天系统中用于实时、机载的CFD应用。实验结果表明，与CPU和GPU方案相比，该方案具有更高的每瓦性能和更稳定的时序表现。研究结果凸显了基于模型的FPGA加速在CFD领域的可扩展性和通用性，为未来应用于非结构化网格及更复杂流动场景奠定了基础。

title: Structural Mutation Based Differential Testing for FPGA Logic Synthesis Compilers
authors: Zhihao Xu, Shikai Guo, Guilin Zhao, Siwen Wang, Qian Ma, Hui Li, Furui Zhan
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) play a crucial role in Electronic Design Automation (EDA) applications, which have been widely used in safety-critical environments, including aerospace, chip manufacturing, and medical devices. A critical stage in FPGA development is logic synthesis, which enables developers to translate their software designs into hardware net lists. However, bugs in FPGA logic synthesis compilers may lead to unexpected behaviors in target hardware net lists, which may cause potential security risks. Therefore, it is critical to detect and repair such bugs in FPGA logic synthesis compilers. While recent testing methods have made progress in automatic bug detection, they remain limited by a fundamental weakness, the generated test cases exhibit minimal timing complexity and structural diversity. To address this challenge, we propose a mutation-based method integrated with Bayesian optimization to detect bugs in FPGA logic synthesis compilers. The method, called SmootHDL, consists with three key components, the Test-program Generation Component (TPG), the Bayesian Diversity Selection Component (BDS), and the Equivalent Test Check Component (ETC). SmootHDL starts with a set of test cases which are called original test cases. To expand the timing test space, the TPG use a control-flow mutation strategy to generate new test cases which is functional equivalent with the original test cases. Furthermore, for increasing diversity of the generated test cases, the BDS combine the Bayesian optimizer to construct a selector based on the control-flow diversity. Finally, the ETC identifies bugs by comparing simulation outputs between original and generated test cases. Since the mutations preserve functional equivalence, functional equivalent test case should have same output. When SmootHDL detects any discrepancy between the outputs, it indicates a potential compiler bug. SmootHDL then reproduces the inconsistent behavior and reports the bug to official developers. We evaluated our method on the mainstream FPGA logic synthesis compilers. Experiments show that SmootHDL can generate more diverse test cases and detect more bugs compared with the latest testing methods for FPGA logic synthesis compilers. Over three months, SmootHDL found 16 bugs, 12 of which were confirmed by official technical support, and 6 have already been fixed.
title_zh: 基于结构变异的FPGA逻辑综合编译器差分测试
abstract_zh: 现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）在电子设计自动化（EDA）应用中发挥着至关重要的作用，而EDA已广泛应用于航空航天、芯片制造和医疗设备等安全关键领域。FPGA开发中的一个关键阶段是逻辑综合，它使开发者能够将软件设计转化为硬件网表。然而，FPGA逻辑综合编译器中的缺陷可能导致目标硬件网表出现意外行为，从而带来潜在的安全风险。因此，检测并修复这些编译器中的缺陷至关重要。尽管近期的测试方法在自动缺陷检测方面取得了一定进展，但仍存在一个根本性局限：所生成的测试用例在时序复杂性和结构多样性方面表现不足。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种结合基于贝叶斯优化的变异方法，用于检测FPGA逻辑综合编译器中的缺陷。该方法名为SmootHDL，包含三个核心组件：测试程序生成组件（TPG）、贝叶斯多样性选择组件（BDS）和等价测试检查组件（ETC）。SmootHDL从一组称为原始测试用例的测试用例开始。为了扩展时序测试空间，TPG采用控制流变异策略生成新的测试用例，这些新用例在功能上与原始测试用例等价。为进一步提升生成测试用例的多样性，BDS结合贝叶斯优化器，基于控制流多样性构建选择器。最后，ETC通过比较原始测试用例与生成测试用例的仿真输出来识别缺陷。由于变异过程保持了功能等价性，等价的测试用例应产生相同的输出。当SmootHDL检测到输出存在差异时，即表明可能存在编译器缺陷。随后，SmootHDL会复现该不一致行为，并将缺陷报告给官方开发人员。我们在主流FPGA逻辑综合编译器上对本方法进行了评估。实验结果表明，与现有的最新测试方法相比，SmootHDL能够生成更多样化的测试用例，并发现更多缺陷。在三个月内，SmootHDL共发现了16个缺陷，其中12个已被官方技术支持团队确认，6个已得到修复。

title: Gradient Guided Parameter Space Sampling for Knowledge Discovery with Limited Budgets
authors: Javier Redondo Antón, Maria Luisa Sapino, K. Selçuk Candan
abstract: Many industrial and scientific tasks entail recovery of an unknown function through an ensemble of experiments, each corresponding to a different scenario. This task can generally be abstracted as the task of evaluating an expensive, deterministic black-box function over combinatorial parameter spaces that are much larger than the available evaluation budget – the sampling capacity becoming exponentially sparser with the number of dimensions of the parameter space. In this paper, we note that existing sampling strategies can potentially waste observations at non-interesting regions of the parameter space or, alternatively, may over-focus on regions that are close to a singular “optimal” point. In contrast, we propose a gradient-guided sampling strategy that aims to obtain samples at the regions of the space where the values of the function are subject to major changes. We present a gradient guided sampler (G2S) that transforms the sampling challenge into a sequence of tractable subspace searches. The proposed method begins with a space-filling design, then iteratively (i) decomposes the full space into low dimensional slices, (ii) adaptively selects among three strategies (locally estimated gradient magnitude, reconstruction error, or the estimated gradient of that error) and (iii) draws new candidates through a custom kernel density estimation sampler. A multi-armed bandit controller allocates budget across the three strategies, continuously trading off exploration and exploitation, without manual tuning. Experimental results on several benchmarks show that the proposed sampler reduces gradient-weighted prediction error relative to strategies like Latin hypercube sampling as well as state-of-the-art Bayesian optimization techniques.
title_zh: 基于梯度引导的参数空间采样在有限预算下的知识发现
abstract_zh:
许多工业和科学任务需要通过一系列实验来恢复一个未知函数，每个实验对应不同的场景。这类任务通常可以抽象为：在一个组合参数空间上评估一个昂贵的、确定性的黑箱函数，而该参数空间远大于可用的评估预算——随着参数空间维度的增加，采样能力呈指数级稀疏化。本文指出，现有的采样策略可能会在参数空间中“不重要”的区域浪费观测资源，或者过度聚焦于接近某个单一“最优”点的局部区域。相比之下，我们提出一种“梯度引导”的采样策略，旨在在函数值发生显著变化的区域获取样本。

我们提出了一种“梯度引导采样器”（Gradient Guided Sampler, G2S），将采样难题转化为一系列可处理的子空间搜索问题。该方法首先采用空间填充设计，然后迭代执行以下步骤：（i）将整个空间分解为低维切片；（ii）自适应地在三种策略之间选择（局部估计的梯度幅值、重构误差，或该误差的估计梯度）；（iii）通过定制的核密度估计采样器生成新的候选样本。一个多臂赌博机控制器在三种策略之间分配预算，持续权衡探索与利用，且无需人工调参。

在多个基准测试上的实验结果表明，与拉丁超立方采样以及最先进的贝叶斯优化技术相比，所提出的采样器能够显著降低梯度加权的预测误差。
